name: Beef and Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Fry ground beef, onion, and green bell pepper in a large frying pan until browned. Drain excess fat.
3. Stir in tomato sauce, green beans, and seasoning. Simmer while preparing the crust.
4. Separate crescent rolls into 8 triangles. Place one triangle at the bottom of an ungreased 9-inch pie plate. Press the edges to form a base.
5. Press the remaining dough around the edge of the pan to form a rim.
6. Beat the egg and mix with 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese. Spread evenly over the crust base.
7. Spoon the hot meat mixture into the center of the crust.
8. Sprinkle the remaining cheddar cheese on top.
9. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown. Serve at room temperature.
